titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Zurara Ibn a'yun, Hariz Ibn Abdullah and Hammad Ibn Isa
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Zurara Ibn a'yun, Hariz Ibn Abdullah and Hammad Ibn Isa

segments: ه عن زرارة بن أعين فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه ابن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد؛ و الحسن بن ظريف؛ و عليّ بن إسماعيل بن عيسى كلّهم عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن حريز بن عبد اللّه، عن زرارة بن أعين‌.
arabic.text: ه عن زرارة بن أعين فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه ابن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد؛ و الحسن بن ظريف؛ و عليّ بن إسماعيل بن عيسى كلّهم عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن حريز بن عبد اللّه، عن زرارة بن أعين‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Zurara ibn A'yun has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn 'Isa ibn 'Ubayd, Al-Hasan ibn Zhurayf, and Ali ibn Isma'il ibn 'Isa, all from Hammad ibn 'Isa, from Hariz ibn Abdullah, from Zurara ibn A'yun.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Zurara ibn A'yun has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn 'Isa ibn 'Ubayd, Al-Hasan ibn Zhurayf, and Ali ibn Isma'il ibn 'Isa, all from Hammad ibn 'Isa, from Hariz ibn Abdullah, from Zurara ibn A'yun.

titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Zurara Ibn a'yun, Hariz Ibn Abdullah and Hammad Ibn Isa

segments: ه عن حريز بن عبد اللّه فقد رويته بهذا الإسناد.
arabic.text: ه عن حريز بن عبد اللّه فقد رويته بهذا الإسناد.

segments: Likewise, everything in this book that is narrated from Hariz ibn Abdullah has been transmitted by me through this same chain of transmission.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Likewise, everything in this book that is narrated from Hariz ibn Abdullah has been transmitted by me through this same chain of transmission.

titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Zurara Ibn a'yun, Hariz Ibn Abdullah and Hammad Ibn Isa

segments: Likewise, everything in this book that is narrated from Hammad ibn Isa has been transmitted by me through this same chain of transmission.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Likewise, everything in this book that is narrated from Hammad ibn Isa has been transmitted by me through this same chain of transmission.
